name: plannotator-visual-explainer
description: > Generate self-contained HTML visualizations with Plannotator theming. Use for implementation plans, PR explainers, architecture diagrams, data tables, slide decks, and any visual explanation of technical concepts. Plans and PR explainers follow Plannotator's prescriptive approach; all other visual content delegates to nicobailon/visual-explainer.
author: backnotprop
summary_zh: 它是一个生成可视化网页的工具，能把开发计划、PR说明或架构图等复杂技术概念变得直观易懂，非常适合技术宣讲和代码审查等需要视觉解释的场景。
